steps.title: Find the signal
steps.content: The key signal is “but perhaps”—a turning point. The narrator shifts from listing what's wrong (colors, lighting, heaviness) to suggesting WHY the furnishings are this way: to preserve the clerical appearance.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: B captures the exact function: it provides a potential explanation for the furnishing choices that the narrator has criticized. A misreads this as a concession rather than an explanation, C mischaracterizes the narrator's view of clergy and luxury, and D fixates on a single design element instead of the broader purpose. That matches choice B — B is correct.
